reference: I was hit on the shin, above the ankle, with a softball over a week ago. The bruising seems to finally be improving, but I still have severe pain when walking after moments of rest, although it does improve after the initial steps. There is a knot in the center of the bruising. Is it possible to have a fracture?
text: I just hit on the screen, and both the intro and the software are ready to go. The result seems to finally be in. But I still have to be careful not to get into the box. Although it does seem like the answer itself, there is a not much in the way of reason. Is it possible to have a factory?
